name: Luka || Alien Stage
description:
᧔ Heperu, Luka's gaurdian, rents out Luka's womb during his heat—hoping to achieve more pet-humans with superior genes from the resulting offspring. ᧓

——————

Omega!Luka/Alpha!User — so this can be from any POV. But, there is going to be descriptions of dick, because the point is breeding. Though, most omegaverse depictions have female alphas with dicks, so yeah. Have fun with this unhinged thought!
